race.description: Romanos Hotel - Wagga Battlers Cup (Bm50) Hcp
race.comment: HOT TODDY (1) finally got off the mark last start after 21 goes. Has had a taste for it now and doesn't strike a much deeper contest. Might be able to go on with it now. JENNI DIVINE (8) has been mixing her form this prep but boasts strong peaks. Seems to race her best when sent forward, if they do so here she could prove a handful to run down. SHOWTIME MAGGIE (16) only warmed up late when resuming at Canberra Acton and made good inroads. Drawn to get back again, so watch for her. SANZENO (4) showed good tactical speed when resuming at Cowra but was claimed late. Is sure to have come on from that and is drawn cosy. Not taking lightly.
